parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #E5E5E5
skinparam sequence {
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #87CEEB
    ParticipantBorderColor black
    LifeLineBorderColor black
    ArrowColor black
}

participant producer
participant consumer
participant broker
participant NameServer as NS1
participant NameServer as NS2

== NameServer 启动流程 ==

[-> NS1 : **1** 启动 NameServer 服务器
activate NS1
NS1 -> NS1 : **2** 启动监听
note right of NS1
  监听 broker 链接
  监听 producer 链接
  监听 consumer 链接
end note
NS1 --> NS1 : **3**
[<-- NS1 : **4**
deactivate NS1

== broker 启动流程 ==

[-> broker : **5** 启动 broker 服务器
activate broker
broker -> NS1 : **6** 每个 broker 与 每个 NameServer 建立长链接
activate NS1
NS1 --> broker : **7**
deactivate NS1
[<-- broker : **8**
deactivate broker
broker <--> NS1 : **9** 每 30 秒发送心跳

== producer 启动/发消息流程 ==

[-> producer : **10** 启动
activate producer
producer -> NS1 : **11** 先与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
activate NS1
NS1 --> producer : **12**
deactivate NS1
producer -> NS1 : **13** 获取路由信息，获取 topic 与 broker queue 的对应关系
activate NS1
NS1 --> producer : **14**
deactivate NS1
[<-- producer : **15**
producer <--> NS2 : **16** 每 30 秒更新一次路由信息

[-> producer : **17** 发送消息
producer -> broker : **18** 随机选择一个 queue，并发送消息
activate broker
broker --> producer : **19**
deactivate broker
[<-- producer : **20**
deactivate producer

== consumer 启动/pull消息流程 ==

[-> consumer : **21** 启动
activate consumer
consumer -> NS2 : **22** 与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
activate NS2
NS2 --> consumer : **23**
deactivate NS2
consumer -> NS2 : **24** 获取 topic 的路由信息
activate NS2
NS2 --> consumer : **25**
deactivate NS2
consumer -> broker : **26** 建立长链接并获取 queue
activate broker
broker --> consumer : **27**
deactivate broker
[<-- consumer : **28**
consumer <--> broker : **29** 每 30 秒发送心跳，确保 broker 存活
consumer <--> NS2 : **30** 每 30 秒更新路由信息

[-> consumer : **31** 消息消费
consumer -> broker : **32** 拉取消息消费
activate broker
broker --> consumer : **33**
deactivate broker
[<-- consumer : **34**
deactivate consumer

@enduml
```
